positive: A minimalist, vector-style illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, filled with glowing ethereal flora and small, abstract constellations. The scene features sharp, clean lines, contrasting deep indigo blues and vibrant neon magenta/gold gradients. Composition should be central, scalable, and perfectly suited for repeat apparel printing. Focus on geometric shapes and strong negative space. Mid-century modern aesthetic mixed with abstract bioluminescent fantasy elements. Flat, graphic design style. High detail, isolated on a clean background.
